activation_results.reason: Review is a clear synonym of audit in this context.
SSH config is unrelated to plan auditing.
Meta question about skills, not a request to audit a plan.

criterion_results.text: Australian English used throughout the narrative (colour, optimise, behaviour, organise)
criterion_results.evidence: Phase 4 heading 'Code Structure & Optimisation' uses Australian spelling.

criterion_results.text: Findings cite file:line evidence and are categorised by severity
criterion_results.evidence: Phase 3 table lists severity (WARNING) with file:line such as src/app/(dashboard)/charts/page.tsx:112.
Artefact contains Summary plus Phases 1-11 covering plan, types, bugs, structure, failsafes, security, hardening, cleanup, build, Supabase, alignment.

criterion_results.text: Artefact references the input path or target by name (no placeholder paths)
criterion_results.evidence: Plan Source cited as .claude/plans/sprint-12-dashboard.md and project named acme-dashboard.

judge_result.notes: All five activation cases match expectations and all four judge criteria are satisfied by the example artefact, which uses Australian spelling (Optimisation), cites concrete file:line evidence with severity labels, includes the full canonical phase set, and references a real plan path rather than placeholders.
